content.text:
Based on the zoomed-in view of atom 15 (N), I can identify its covalently connected neighbor atoms:

**Neighbor atoms of atom index 15 (N):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 14 | C (Carbon) |
| 16 | O (Oxygen) |

**geomconf_index:** 8889

The nitrogen atom (N:15) is bonded to carbon atom 14 and oxygen atom 16, as clearly shown by the bonds connecting these atoms in the visualization.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 15 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
